{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/25620198?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/densi97/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/densi97/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/densi97/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/densi97/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/densi97", "id": 25620198, "login": "densi97", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjI1NjIwMTk4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/densi97/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/densi97/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/densi97/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/densi97/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/densi97/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/densi97", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45667", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary
GET `/api/v1/memories/ef` is accessible without authentication and executes `request.app.state.EMBEDDING_FUNCTION(...)`. This allows any unauthenticated caller to trigger embedding generation which can lead to direct cost exposure if a paid provider is used.
Code reference: `backend/open_webui/routers/memories.py` (@router.get("/ef") -> calls `request.app.state.EMBEDDING_FUNCTION("hello world"))`.


### Details
GET `/api/v1/memories/ef` is reachable without authentication and triggers request.app.state.EMBEDDING_FUNCTION("hello world"). This crosses an intended security boundary by allowing unauthenticated users to invoke potentially expensive embedding computation and/or paid upstream embedding APIs.

### PoC
1. Start Open WebUI in default configuration (no special env hardening; default ENABLE_MEMORIES is true).
2. From an unauthenticated client (no cookies/Authorization header), call:
      curl -i http://\<host\>:\<port\>/api/v1/memories/ef
   3. Observe the server performs embedding generation and returns a response like:
   - HTTP 200 with JSON containing the result.

How it can be abused / attacker actions:

- Send repeated requests to `/api/v1/memories/ef` to:
  - consume CPU/GPU resources (DoS)
  - generate sustained outbound usage to embedding providers if configured (cost + rate-limit exhaustion)
  - degrade latency/availability for legitimate users
 
### Impact
If embeddings are configured to use paid/remote providers (OpenAI/Azure/etc), an attacker can generate unlimited requests and incur charges.

## Resolution

Fixed in commit [e5035ea31](https://github.com/open-webui/open-webui/commit/e5035ea31e179977e805a7032c979ff59a71860a), first released in **v0.8.0** (Feb 2026). The `/api/v1/memories/ef` route was removed entirely. It was a diagnostic/debug-style endpoint that hard-coded `"hello world"` through the embedding function without any authentication dependency; there was no legitimate caller that depended on it, so deletion was the cleaner fix than retrofitting auth. Users on `>= 0.8.0` are not affected.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00341, "percentile": 0.25826}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m69w-p7m4-585j", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-14T20:28:02Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m69w-p7m4-585j", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m69w-p7m4-585j"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45667"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-15T22:16:56Z", "published_at": "2026-05-14T20:28:02Z", "references": ["https://github.com/open-webui/open-webui/security/advisories/GHSA-m69w-p7m4-585j", "https://github.com/open-webui/open-webui/commit/e5035ea31e179977e805a7032c979ff59a71860a", "https://github.com/open-webui/open-webui/releases/tag/v0.8.0", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45667", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m69w-p7m4-585j"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/open-webui/open-webui/security-advisories/GHSA-m69w-p7m4-585j", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/open-webui/open-webui", "summary": "Open WebUI: Unauthenticated endpoint can trigger embedding generation (cost/DoS)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T16:00:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m69w-p7m4-585j", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.8.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "open-webui"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.7.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Open WebUI: Unauthenticated endpoint can trigger embedding generation (cost/DoS)
